title: DAJAVE 500 Pcs Bamboo Cocktail Sticks 12cm Bamboo Knotted Cocktail Sticks Natural Knotted Bamboo Skewers Fancy Tooth Picks for Drinks, Fruit, Barbecue, Sandwiches, Cocktail Accessories
features: Cocktail Sticks: You will receive 500pcs cocktail sticks with knot, each skewer is 12cm/4.7inch, which is enough for your daily use and replacement, The bamboo cocktail sticks are perfect for buffets, finger foods, snacks, cupcake toppers, fruit skewers, and more

Premium Material: The knotted cocktail sticks are made from 100% biodegradable and environmentally friendly bamboo, which is elegant, durable and not easy to break, These bamboo knot cocktail sticks won't impair food flavor

Easy To Use: Each bamboo knot skewers have angled sharp tips to easily pierce food, Besides, the 12cm knotted bamboo skewers are long enough for keeping ingredients pinned together, After you use them, you can just throw them away or wash them for the next use

Knot Design: Bamboo cocktail sticks with looped knot end adds elegant to your food presentation, which is a great way to add sophistication and style to any dish or drink, In contrast to straight toothpicks, the knot at the top prevents food from falling out, and making bamboo sticks easier for you to hold

Wide Application: The bamboo cocktail sticks 12cm will bring a pleasant experience to you or your guests and make the party more colorful, Whether you're hosting a celebration party, or just having a drink at home, these cocktail accessories are sure to bring more fun and excitement to your life
description: Product Description DAJAVE 12cm Bamboo Knotted Cocktail Sticks Natural Knotted Bamboo Skewers Fancy Tooth Picks for Drinks, Fruit, Sandwiches, Cocktail Accessories Why choose our cocktail sticks? Large Quantity The package includes 500pcs bamboo cocktail skewers, the quantity are enough for you to decorate your drinks, fruits and meat at your party. Premium Material The cocktail sticks are made of 100% selected high quality natural bamboo, durable, biodegradable and eco-friendly, and will not affect the flavour of your food. Convenient Design The bamboo knot skewers have angled sharp tips, which is convenient for you to pick up food. And the natural color of wooden cocktail skewers can increase your appetite. Package Include Material: Bamboo Color: Green Size: 12cm/4.7inch Package Include: 500 x Knotted Cocktail Sticks Each bamboo skewers knot measures 12 centimeters in length, making them the perfect size for using in buffets, finger foods, snacks, cupcake toppers, fruit skewers, and more. Bamboo Material Sloping End Looped Knot Design The bamboo cocktail sticks 12cm with looped knot design, simple but elegant, can add sophistication and style to any dish or drink. These knotted cocktail sticks are enough to meet your daily needs. Such as fruits, desserts, BBQ, snacks, kebabs, sandwiches, etc. Bamboo knot skewers also perfect for all kinds of parties and gatherings, such as birthday parties, Christmas, themed parties, beach parties, bars or outdoors, etc.
